meaning: adj.浪费的 vbl.misspend的过去式及过去分词
examples: Much of the money was grossly misspent.
A clean house is a sign of a misspent life.
Money misspent one year is clawed back the next.
My own chronic injury owes to a misspent youth trying to be the next Steve Prefontaine.
But many of the mechanisms for recovering misspent funds are inadequate, the auditors say.
